seoTitle: Narellan Vale vs Narone Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Narellan Vale and Narone Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Narellan Vale vs Narone Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Narellan Vale and Narone Creek.
heading: Narellan Vale vs Narone Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narellan Vale, New South Wales and Narone Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Narellan Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Narone Creek (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narellan Vale or Narone Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narellan Vale has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Narone Creek scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narellan Vale scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Narone Creek scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narellan Vale or Narone Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Narellan Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
